hint.en: Wake words installed on the device, reported when it connects. The active one is marked.
Type one of the available wake words (name or id, e.g. 'Okay Nabu' or 'okay_nabu') to activate it on the device. Leave empty to keep the current one.
Audio trimmed from the start of a wake-word turn to swallow the wake-word sound.
Audio trimmed from the start of a follow-up (conversation) turn. There is no wake-word sound here — keep this small, just enough to swallow the mic-open noise burst.

The device's ESPHome API encryption key (the 32-byte base64 string from its YAML configuration). Required when the device has API encryption enabled — e.g. after being adopted by Home Assistant. Leave empty for unencrypted devices (or to keep using the key entered during pairing).
